chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1685 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No.7641/19 2. For hearing of main case 07.05.2025 Ms. Mehwish, advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Pervez Ahmed Mastoi, AAG. --------- None present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
